name: Kyoshin Co., Ltd.
summary: Kyoshin Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides educational services in Japan and internationally. The company offers various educational services, such as exam preparation, early childhood education, and basic academic achievement improvement. It also provides learning cram school services, childcare service, English conversation, nursing care services, and Japanese education services, as well as offers Kyoto e-DES, an online learning program. In addition, the company franchises classroom tutoring services under the Kyosei School One brand. Further, it engages in the International human resources exchange project. Kyoshin Co., Ltd. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
